title: <div>Write a substantive draft with a minimum of 350 - 650 words, each paragraph
content:
Write a substantive draft with a minimum of 350 - 650 words, each paragraph being approximately 4 - 6 sentences or more.
Include descriptive devices such as metaphor, similes, and/or personification.
Demonstrate that all aspects of your topic have been considered.
Use the plagiarism tool to check your summary against unintended plagiarism.
Refer to the guidelines below to complete each phase of your essay following the required APA format:
APA (7th Edition) Student Sample Paper
APA Formatting and Style Guide (7th Edition)
Spell-check your essay.
Save your work using the proper naming convention and attach your file to submit.
Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 3 - 4 hours.

rubric for rough draft narrative essay:
